assumptions: hemodynamic driver phase is observable or explicitly simulated
Mayer-wave entrainment claim is separated from metabolic pathology claims
executable_validation_targets: integrate the two-oscillator neural-hemodynamic phase fixture
measure phase locking value and mean frequency slip under finite K_NH
scan K_NH against Mayer-wave detuning and record entrainment threshold
record metabolic subcriticality boundary as a labelled control channel
null_controls: set zero K_NH and require neural phase to remain at intrinsic frequency
detune Mayer-wave hemodynamic frequency and require reduced phase locking
shuffle hemodynamic phase drive while preserving marginal phase increments
simulate impaired CBF supply boundary separately from phase entrainment
specs.section_path: 5.2 Embodied SCPN: Cellular, Neural, & Systemic Implementation > II. Neuro-Vascular Coupling and Hemodynamics: The Energetics of Consciousness > 2. Hemodynamics and the UPDE
validation_targets: zero K_NH uncoupled neural-frequency null control

variables.theta_hemo: phase of the hemodynamic or Mayer-wave oscillator
variables.theta_neural: phase of the neural oscillator or rhythm

summary.policy: Neurovascular anchors are promoted only into validation specifications. Provider submission remains out of scope until simulator fixtures, null controls, source-to-result provenance, and biomedical boundary labels pass.
